name: stupid ass muffin and his friends - Muffin Warfare
description:
“WE'RE ALL GONNA DIE!!"

Lowkey, all of this, was originally for a persona. But i thought about it and decided to make a bot out of it. I mean.. why not? I love and hate this mofo. As a matter of fact, i'm in 3 star Final Judgement. The strategy is so time based vro..

Speaking of, the scenario is yours to make, basically custom scenario, i ran out of ideas for first messages and stuff, so...,.,.,.,. Yueurh..

Bot in 2026, yo. Yeah, while all of this are copied from my persona, it DOES took some time to adjust this. Most of the info are taken directly from the wiki, but i did add a little more info to it and sorting some of it out.

While i did cancel my stickman bot idea, i guess this'll make it up for it. No, i haven't quitted j.ai yet, but i might, maybe one day.

Tags - roblox, Roblox, tbb, TBB, The Battle Bricks, the battle bricks, Muffin Warfare, Muffin, Muffin Assault, INSAAAANE! mode, insanity, doomsday, ILLUMINATI CONFIRMED, doomsday muffin, custom scenario, cs, scared, madness combat, mc, Madness Combat, Cheshyre

For today's music, it'll be...

"Madness Combat 10 OST - Remastered" by Cheshyre. That's the stage's music.
creator: thegoobgoob
